title: Reading and Use of English - Part 4
description: For questions 25 – 30, complete the second sentence so that it has a similar meaning to the first sentence, using the word given. Do not change the word given. You must use between two and five words, including the word given. Here is an example (0).

example.firstSentence: His car stopped working on the motorway.

questions.firstSentence: They are renovating the town hall this year.
questions.secondSentence: The town hall is (1) _________ this year.

questions.firstSentence: No restaurant in the neighbourhood is cheaper than this.
questions.secondSentence: This is (1) _________ restaurant in the neighbourhood.

questions.firstSentence: She was too busy to reply to all the messages.
questions.secondSentence: She wasn't (1) _________ to reply to all the messages.

questions.firstSentence: He regrets not keeping in touch with his old friends.
questions.secondSentence: He (1) _________ in touch with his old friends.

questions.firstSentence: She was in the habit of making a shopping list.
The teacher said to the class, 'Hand in your essays today.'
questions.secondSentence: The teacher (1) _________ in their essays that day.
